reasoning: In recent years, the 'cube' shape has become a more widely recognized and reported UAP shape (likely boosted by widely publicized Navy pilot sightings of 'cubes in spheres'). Assuming a conservative Poisson distribution with an expected rate of 3 to 6 reports per month, the probability of receiving at least one is greater than 95%.
